name: TalentFlow HR Agent
description: An intelligent HR automation agent that handles full-cycle recruitment, internal talent matching, employee policy FAQs, and burnout risk detection.

skills.name: resume_screening
skills.description: Screen candidate resumes against job descriptions with fit scoring and skill gap analysis

skills.name: interview_questions
skills.description: Generate tailored interview questions based on candidate resume and role requirements

skills.name: email_drafting
skills.description: Draft professional offer or rejection emails for candidates

skills.name: internal_talent_matching
skills.description: Match open roles against existing employee profiles before posting externally

skills.name: policy_faq
skills.description: Answer employee HR policy questions from the official policy document

skills.name: burnout_risk_detection
skills.description: Assess employee burnout risk and recommend HR interventions
